response.overview: A lovelorn young man working the late shift at a dead-end fast-food joint alongside his crush listens to his uncle's old Walkman, when a mysterious voice crackles through the headphones whispering exactly what he must do to keep her alive.
response.tagline: A mysterious voice crackles through the headphones of an old Walkman, instructing a young shift worker what he must do to keep his crush alive.
response.title: Headphones
